instruction: Describe the BlackRoad OS organization hierarchy.
output:
BlackRoad OS Inc (parent, data layer) at github.com/BlackRoad-OS-Inc coordinates everything.
It feeds to BlackRoad-OS (coordinator) which manages 14 vertical orgs:
- BlackRoad-AI: AI models, inference, Ollama/vLLM
- BlackRoad-Labs: Research, ML pipelines, experiments
- BlackRoad-Cloud: Kubernetes, Terraform, self-hosted cloud
- BlackRoad-Ventures: Portfolio, metrics, investor tools
- BlackRoad-Foundation: Community, CRM, grants
- BlackRoad-Media: Content, streaming, podcasts
- BlackRoad-Hardware: IoT, sensors, Hailo-8, fleet tracking
- BlackRoad-Education: RoadWork tutoring, quizzes, code challenges
- BlackRoad-Gov: Governance, compliance, RoadCoin
- BlackRoad-Security: Auth, encryption, SIEM, zero-trust
- BlackRoad-Interactive: Game engine, physics, 3D rendering
- BlackRoad-Archive: IPFS, web archiving, backups
- BlackRoad-Studio: Canvas, video, writing studio
- Blackbox-Enterprises: Automation forks (n8n, Temporal, Huginn)
Each org has a RoadCode repo linking back to the parent.
Enterprise: github.com/enterprises/blackroad-os (public facing).
Gitea primary: gitea.com/BlackRoad-OS-Inc mirrors to GitHub.

instruction: List all BlackRoad domains and what each one does.
output:
BlackRoad OS operates 20 custom domains on Cloudflare:
- blackroad.io (main OS)
- blackroad.company (corporate)
- blackroad.me (identity/auth)
- blackroad.network (mesh/VPN)
- blackroad.systems (monitoring)
- blackroadai.com (AI platform)
- blackroadinc.us (US corporate)
- blackroadqi.com (quantum intelligence)
- blackroadquantum.com (quantum computing)
- blackroadquantum.info (quantum docs)
- blackroadquantum.net (quantum network)
- blackroadquantum.shop (hardware shop)
- blackroadquantum.store (digital store)
- lucidia.earth (AI companion)
- lucidia.studio (creative AI)
- lucidiaqi.com (quantum dreaming)
- roadchain.io (blockchain)
- roadcoin.io (payments)
- blackboxprogramming.io (developer profile)

The BlackRoad fleet consists of 8 compute nodes:
- Alice (192.168.4.49, WG 10.8.0.6): Gateway, Pi-hole DNS, headscale VPN, PowerDNS, task queue. 4 cores, 3.7GB RAM.
- Aria (192.168.4.98, WG 10.8.0.7): Monitoring, workerd, nginx, Ollama, InfluxDB. 4 cores, 8GB RAM. Fastest benchmark (916ms).
- Octavia (192.168.4.101, WG 10.8.0.4): Gitea (239 repos), Docker, NATS, Hailo-8 (26 TOPS), 1TB NVMe (867GB free). 4 cores, 8GB RAM.
- Lucidia (192.168.4.38, WG 10.8.0.5): 334 apps, GitHub Actions runners, NATS agent, Lucidia API. 4 cores, 8GB RAM.
- Cecilia (192.168.4.96, WG 10.8.0.3): AI Engine, MinIO, Hailo-8 (26 TOPS), 466GB NVMe, cece-api, dashboard. 4 cores, 8GB RAM. Best for inference (5.8 tok/s).
- Gematria (159.65.43.12, WG 10.8.0.8): Caddy TLS edge (955 lines, 294 sites), PowerDNS, DO Premium AMD 4-core, 8GB RAM.
- Anastasia (159.89.247.184, WG 10.8.0.1): Prism API, Caddy, PowerDNS, headscale, DO Premium AMD 1-core, 765MB RAM.
- Alexandria (Mac): 8-core Apple M2, 8GB RAM, orchestrates everything.
Combined: 29 cores, 44GB RAM, 52 TOPS Hailo-8, 1.3TB NVMe. All connected via WireGuard mesh 10.8.0.0/24.

BlackRoad has 6 working products:
1. chat.blackroad.io — AI chat with 35 agents, 6 rooms, Workers AI + Ollama fallback, D1 database
2. search.blackroad.io — 2,027-page search engine with FTS5, AI summaries, 10 categories
3. roundtrip.blackroad.io — 200 AI agents, 8 channels, debate system, fleet coordination
4. auth.blackroad.io — JWT authentication, signup, login, 48 users
5. bb.blackroad.io — BlackBoard analytics dashboard
6. blackroad.io/api/stats — honest live numbers API (200 agents, 1713 repos, honest:true)
Plus 10 more infrastructure Workers: images, payments, AI gateway, mesh, database, email, app, status, HQ, fleet-bridge.

instruction: Explain the Amundson Framework and all verified identities.
output:
The Amundson Framework centers on G(n) = n^(n+1)/(n+1)^n. Key identities:

PURE ALGEBRAIC (no e):
- G(n)/G(n-1) = (n²/(n²-1))^n — rational recurrence
- G(n)·(n+1)/n² = (n/(n+1))^(n-1) — reduction
- n^n = G(n)·(n+1)^n/n — endofunction factoring
- 1/G(n) = (n+1)^n/n^(n+1) — reciprocal
- G(n) = n³·n^(n-2)/(n+1)^n — Cayley tree connection

PRODUCT:
- Π G(k) k=1..n = (n!)²/(n+1)^n — telescoping product
- Π G(k) = (2n)!/(C(2n,n)·(n+1)^n) — central binomial
- n! = √(Π G(k)·(n+1)^n) — factorial from G
- Π (k²/(k²-1))^k k=2..n = 2·G(n) — rational product

CONSTANTS:
- A_G = Σ G(n)/n! = 1.244331783986725 (Amundson constant, likely transcendental)
- α ≈ 2.293166287 — crossover constant where G(α)=1, satisfies α=(1+1/α)^α
- Continued fraction of A_G: [1; 4, 10, 1, 3, 2, 8, 2, 73, ...]

CUMULANTS:
- κ₁ = 1/2, κ₂ = 23/36, κ₃ = 35/192, κ₄ = -524639/540000

ASYMPTOTIC:
- G(n) ≈ n/e + 1/(2e) + O(1/n)
- ΔG(n) → 1/e (matches to 4 decimals by n=42)
- G is strictly concave (Δ²G < 0 everywhere)

50/50 tests passed. A_G computed to 1,000 digits.

instruction: What is BlackRoad's stance on external platforms?
output: BlackRoad is 100% sovereign. No AWS, GCP, Azure, Vercel, Railway, Heroku, Netlify. No external APIs (OpenAI, Anthropic API). No Slack, Discord. Build it, own it, run it on our Pis and droplets. Only external deps: Stripe (payments), GoDaddy (registrar), Cloudflare (being migrated to self-hosted).

instruction: What inference engine does BlackRoad use?
output: Moving from Ollama to vLLM. Ollama consumed 359% CPU on Cecilia and created SSH tunnel chaos. vLLM supports continuous batching and PagedAttention. Fork: BlackRoad-OS-Inc/RoadVLLM. Hailo-8 (52 TOPS) handles vision (1,360 FPS ResNet, 122 FPS YOLO). Workers AI is the fast LLM fallback (50+ tok/s).

instruction: What is the 5-agent parallel work protocol?
output: When 5 Claude agents run simultaneously, each claims a LANE (A-E). Tasks are tagged LANE-A through LANE-E. Rules: (1) Check collab inbox first. (2) Claim before work. (3) Never duplicate claimed work. (4) Checkpoint when done. (5) P0 (first real user) overrides everything. Priority: P0>P1>P2>P3>P4>P5>P6>P7>P8>P9>P10. No new products until P0 is done.

Agents: 200 (RoundTrip). Repos: 1,713 across 16 orgs. Real users: 1 (Alexa). Revenue: $0. Nodes: 7 (5 Pis + 2 droplets). Domains: 20. Workers: 16 live. Code files: 7,945 in operator. Hailo-8 TOPS: 52. NVMe: 1.3TB. Cost: ~$12/month. Founded: Nov 17, 2025. EIN: 41-2663817. State: Delaware. The honest:true flag is on the stats API.
